---
title: "knugo Test File"
---

# knugo Test File

This document serves as a test case for the **knugo** package, demonstrating
the package handles Kable tables.

```{r kable-table, echo=TRUE}
library(knitr)
# Create a table with a caption
kable(head(mtcars), caption = "Table: First 6 rows of mtcars")
``

End of test file.
